subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Adorn these Thy servants with the ornament of justice and equity, and illumine their hearts with the light of Thy knowledge and their heads [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی زین عبادک بطراز العدل و الانصاف و نور قلوبهم بنور معرفتک و رؤوسهم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @teaching the Cause; call to teach
